result.name: Pixie dust
result.description: Level: 1d6 Form: Glass bottle filled with glittering light Effect: Shake the glittering light on a living being and it can fly for ten minutes per artifact level. If the being can already fly, shaking the light on them grounds them, taking away their ability to be airborne for the same amount of time. Depletion: 1 in 1d10

sections.name: Pixie dust
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6

Form: Glass bottle filled with glittering light

Effect: Shake the glittering light on a living being and it can fly for ten minutes per artifact level. If the being can already fly, shaking the light on them grounds them, taking away their ability to be airborne for the same amount of time.

Depletion: 1 in 1d10
